creator: steve@mouf.net
text:
new port of perl module Crypt::Tea. Note the lower case "ea", which is a different cpan module than Crypt::TEA, which is already in ports. In order to distinguish this module in ports, I've used underscores in the name. If that's not proper or there's a better way, please let me know.

Fix: see attached

Patch attached with submission follows:
